name: harness-factory
description: Build a project-specific, runtime-neutral agent-team harness and render native Claude and Codex adapters.

interface.shortDescription: Build Claude and Codex agent-team harnesses
interface.longDescription: Analyze a project, define a runtime-neutral orchestration and evaluation contract, then render equivalent Claude and Codex skills and agents.
defaultPrompt: Build a Claude and Codex harness for this project.
Generate an agent team and evaluation loop for this repository.
